LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF EDGAR LOPEZ, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF AND OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT. THE PROPOSED ORDER SHOULD INCLUDE A FUTURE DATE FOR A COMPLIANCE HEARING NO MORE THAN SIX MONTHS IN THE FUTURE. PLAINTIFF OR THE SETTLEMENT ADMINISTRATOR MUST FILE A DECLARATION AT LEAST FIVE COURT DAYS IN ADVANCE OF THE COMPLIANCE HEARING REPORTING THE NUMBER OF UNCASHED CHECKS FOLLOWING SETTLEMENT DISTRIBUTION AND THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS TRANSMITTED TO THE CALIFORNIA CONTROLLER'S UNCLAIMED PROPERTY FUND. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Off Calendar

Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EDGAR LOPEZ, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF AND OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

The unopposed motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement is granted. Plaintiff shall prepare a proposed order and judgment. The proposed order should include a future date for a compliance hearing no more than six months in the future. Plaintiff or the settlement administrator must file a declaration at least five court days in advance of the compliance hearing reporting the number of uncashed checks following settlement distribution and the total amount of funds transmitted to the California Controller's unclaimed property fund.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W.Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
